preamble: The palatalization of the voiced alveolar nasal [n] to [nʲ]. This shift occurs when the nasal is followed by high front vowels or the palatal glide [j].

examples.note: Historical palatalization of the final nasal.

sources: Hickey, R. (2011). The Dialects of Irish.
Jones, D., & Ward, D. (1969). The Phonetics of Russian.
